content.problemStatement:
Your task is to write a program to


Remove the extra spaces at the start and end of the string using strip().
Split the cleaned string into words using split().
Convert the list of words into a tuple and print the number of unique words in the tuple.

Input Format
A single line containing the sentence (string with words separated by spaces, may have leading/trailing spaces).



Output Format
Print the count of unique words in the tuple.

sampleTestCases.input: data science data data AI AI

hidden.input: data science data data AI AI

code.Python3:
# Read the input string with possible leading/trailing spaces
sentence = input()

# Remove leading and trailing spaces
cleaned_sentence = sentence.strip()

# Split the sentence into words (list)
words_list = cleaned_sentence.split()

# Convert the list to a tuple
words_tuple = tuple(words_list)

# Calculate the count of unique words using set
unique_count = len(set(words_tuple))

# Print the number of unique words
print(unique_count)
